title: gladiolus gallaecicus
intro: Gladiolus gallaecicus, also known as the Galician gladiolus, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus gallaecicus include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, making it a natural remedy for alleviating symptoms of asthma and other breathing disorders. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus gallaecicus are typically made by infusing the plant's flowers and roots in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
